title: After the Arima Kinen: Handing Off the Friendship Baton ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"You take it from here!" Daitaku Helios starts to
lose steam after their breakaway, and Mejiro
Palmer takes the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wins the Arima Kinen and the crowd starts
chanting her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer, the black sheep of the Mejiro
family, has left her mark in history as the
magnificent runaway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the winner's interview, she goes full party mode
and then shows everyone her most impressive
runaway yet.
